title: hey recommend me a solid base comp for my 35s to work off of

turns.userText: hey recommend me a solid base comp for my 35s to work off of
turns.agentText:
Good — 35 players is 7 subgroups of 5, solidly in zerg territory. Let me draft a baseline comp from the current meta (Firebrand/Luminary for per-SG stability, Druid/Scrapper/Specter for sustain, Necro/Spellbreaker for strip, Evoker for ranged DPS), then run it through `comp_check` before showing you anything.

**Zero hard errors.** The two squad-wide warnings ("no boon strip DPS", "no secondary support") are label-vocabulary false positives — comp_check didn't recognize my custom role strings, but the actual builds cover both. I'll call out exactly where below.

---

## Baseline 35-Man WvW Comp (7 × 5)

Per the [MetaBattle WvW tier list](https://metabattle.com/wiki/WvW) and [gw2mists zerg builds](https://gw2mists.com), boons only reach 5 targets ([GW2 Wiki – Boon](https://wiki.guildwars2.com/wiki/Boon)), so every subgroup carries its own stability anchor.

| SG | Stability Anchor | Healer / Sustain | Strip / Corrupt | DPS × 2 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **1** | Firebrand | Druid | Core Necromancer | Reaper · Spellbreaker |
| **2** | Luminary | Scrapper (Med Kit) | Core Necromancer | Reaper · Amalgam |
| **3** | Firebrand | Specter | Spellbreaker | Untamed · Berserker |
| **4** | Luminary | Harbinger *(off-support + boon corrupt)* | Harbinger / Virtuoso | Evoker · Reaper |
| **5** | Firebrand | Troubadour | Core Necromancer | Evoker · Dragonhunter |
| **6** | Luminary | Druid | Evoker | Evoker · Reaper |
| **7** | Firebrand | Scrapper (Med Kit) | Virtuoso | Untamed · Berserker |

---

### Role accounting (35 slots)

| Role | Builds | Count |
|---|---|---|
| Stability anchor (Stab + boon spread) | 4× Firebrand · 3× Luminary | **7** |
| Heal / cleanse / barrier | 2× Druid · 2× Scrapper Med Kit · 1× Specter · 1× Troubadour | **6** |
| Boon corrupt / strip | 3× Core Necro · 1× Harbinger · 2× Spellbreaker · 2× Virtuoso · 2× Untamed | **10** |
| Pure DPS (ranged backline) | 4× Evoker | **4** |
| Pure DPS (frontline) | 4× Reaper · 1× Amalgam · 2× Berserker · 1× Dragonhunter | **8** |

**14 support / 21 DPS** — roughly 40/60, which is on the heavier-support end intentionally; you can swap a healer slot in SG6 or SG7 for a 5th Evoker or Reaper once your roster is comfortable surviving.

---

### Key decisions called out

- **Firebrand vs. Luminary for stability** — both are Meta per [MetaBattle WvW](https://metabattle.com/wiki/WvW). Luminary's Radiant Forge resets Virtue cooldowns for more sustained boon uptime; Firebrand has better raw Stability stacks. Alternate them rather than stacking one.
- **Harbinger in SG4** does double duty: boon corruption (Well of Corruption, boon-strip Shroud) *and* off-Quickness. It's the squad-wide corrupt anchor, not a pure healer — SG4 leans on Druid in SG6 being nearby or an adjacent support floating.
- **SG6 runs 4× Evoker / Reaper** — this is your pure backline pressure group. Keep it behind the blob and off the melee train.
- **WvW does NOT use per-subgroup Quickness/Alacrity** the way PvE does. Firebrand drops Quickness as a side effect of boon support, not as its primary function — no need to dedicate an Alacrity bot per group.

---

Want me to save this as a comp preset in AxiTools, or tune it for a specific roster you already have?
